name: Easy White Chocolate Mousse with Fresh Fruit Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 8oz tub frozen light whipped topping, thawed
4 cups finely diced fresh summer fruit such as:
1 cup loosely packed cilantro leaves, finely chopped
1 small fresh jalapeno pepper, seeded, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Have ready a serving bowl or 8 individual dessert dishes and a large bowl of ice cubes.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over water in a microwave-safe bowl or small saucepan. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 40-50 seconds, or stir over low heat until completely dissolved.
4. Put white chocolate and milk into an 8-cup microwave-safe measure (or a 3-quart saucepan). Microwave for 1 minute on HIGH, or place the saucepan over medium heat until the milk is steaming hot. Stir until the chocolate dissolves.
5. Stir in gelatin and rum. Set the measuring cup or saucepan into ice. Stir constantly until the mixture just begins to thicken.
6. Whisk in about 1/2 cup of the whipped topping. Remove from ice. Gently fold (stir) in the remaining topping until completely blended. Pour into the serving bowl or dishes, cover, and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, or up to 3 days.
7. Serve with Fresh Fruit Salsa: In a medium bowl, gently mix all ingredients. Serve immediately or refrigerate up to 4 hours before serving.
